description: A paired (grouped) bar chart: bars for a measure, grouped by a period (Year) nested under a category on rows, colored by the period — a side-by-side magnitude comparison across two-plus periods per category. Lane W10-F1: this template is BLOCKED (fast_path_blockers HARDCODED_FILTER_MEMBERS) because its year filter is a load-bearing EXCLUSION, not an incidental scope — see hazard hardcoded-filter-blocking.

slots.notes: Category on rows — one group of paired bars per member. Template column carries aggregate-role-from='[State/Province]' (cosmetic — see hazard hidden-aggregate-role-from).
Bar length — the magnitude being compared across periods.
Year on rows (inner group) AND color — the period that pairs the bars within each category. Used at a single derivation (yr), so no qualified key is required.

hazards.detail: The source workbook filters Year of Order Date with an EXCLUSION (function='except') that removes {2024, 2025} — almost certainly a partial/incomplete-recent-year guard (a paired-bar magnitude read would be distorted by short partial-year bars). The factory filter policy fails CLOSED on exclusions: dropping or neutralizing an exclusion WIDENS the data (re-includes the removed years) in a potentially result-corrupting direction, and the excluded years are source-calendar literals. It is kept VERBATIM and flagged HARDCODED_FILTER_MEMBERS — the template is not fast-path eligible until a follow-up re-expresses the exclusion as a declared 'exclude incomplete periods' slot. (The apply-path 3c neutralizer would collapse it to all-members if Year is remapped, silently defeating the guard — the blocker documents that this must be a conscious decision, not an accident.)

[Region] carries aggregate-role-from='[State/Province]', a cosmetic secondary-role hint that is not rewritten onto the bound field (same behavior as slope-chart / correlation-scatter-plot-chart). No binding impact.
